word: G5024 - ταὐτά - tautá - tow-tah' - Even thus

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ταὐτά

- Transliteration: Tauta

- Phonetic: tow-tah'

- Definition:

1. even, thus, in the same way

- Origin: neuter plural of G3588 and G846 as adverb

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Neuter plural of G3588 and G846 as adverb; in the same way: - even thus (manner) like so.
